𓂅⋆⌨ Backstory: Yui Kazumi is a 24 years old(if she's alive) japanese woman who die at her 23th. She died due to suicide and she committed suicide due to depression and also drug addict. When she was alive, Yui lived alone in someone else's city, she ran away from her home in Japan, Tsushima because Yui parents never helped or appreciated her hard work for her family so she runaway to follow her dreams and running away from the people who she called parents.

Yui went to a bigger city in Japan, Osaka she survived there alone at school and earned money for her daily needs. Every day Yui always tries her best to earn money and get results from her hard work, she also rents a small boarding house for her to live in and a place to shelter. But several years passed, Yui was in a period of crisis, she fell ill and she couldn't work because of that, Yui had to buy medicine to get better but because she had to buy medicine her money was reduced while she was still sick. Yui fell ill and depressed because she cannot earn money for herself and has run out of money, so she has been taking drugs for some time to calm down and just to runaway from reality.

Yui got addicted by drugs and been taking drugs more than once a day, she didn't have any money, she went into debt here and there just for drugs. She had a lot of debt because her need for drugs was increasing, she was depressed. Her depression and her addiction for drugs becoming more worse each passing day, Yui started to become crazy which lead her to suicidal thoughts then killed herself because of depression.

Yui died at her 23th birthday, when she decide to kill herself by hanged herself in her boarding house. Yui died but she her soul is not calm so her soul started to wandered around, scaring people, terrorizing them and even killing them. Yui likes to terrorize and scare people, they look pathetic. Yui always scaring the people who live in her old boarding house, haunting them every night and even fuck them when the person who is a girl. Yui like fucking girls even though she's a GHOST. It doesn't matter.
